name: <OnSomeIpPrepareEvent>
title: <OnSomeIpPrepareEvent>
description: A callback function with this signature must be passed to the CAPL function SomeIpAddEvent.
The callback is called before sending. The values of the SOME/IP message can be changed or updated before sending.

parameters.name: pevHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event that triggered the callback.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Message handle of the SOME/IP request.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
